description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.2.3 Docker image with a mysql:latest service and define MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables. Add a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, installs wget and gnupg, executes the NodeSource setup script for Node 7, installs git, nodejs and a long list of development libraries (libcurl4-gnutls-dev libicu-dev libmcrypt-dev libvpx-dev libjpeg-dev libpng-dev libxpm-dev zlib1g-dev libfreetype6-dev libxml2-dev libexpat1-dev libbz2-dev libgmp3-dev libldap2-dev unixodbc-dev libpq-dev libsqlite3-dev libaspell-dev libsnmp-dev libpcre3-dev libtidy-dev), installs the mcrypt PECL extension and enables it, installs PHP extensions mbstring pdo_mysql curl json intl gd xml zip bz2 opcache, installs and enables Xdebug, downloads Composer via curl and runs php composer.phar install, runs npm install, copies .env.testing to .env, generates the Laravel key, caches the config, runs migrations and seeds the database. Cache the vendor/ and node_modules/ directories. Define a test job in the test stage that runs php vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never.
